title: Mass mailing of complex e-mail in Monday
excerpt:

posts.author: Andrei (Andrei Dratov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday Development Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to suggest a significant enhancement to the mailing functionality within Monday CRM. As an active user of your platform, I have observed the immense potential and versatility it offers. However, I believe that expanding the mailing function to include capabilities as in specialized tools such as Brevo and Mailchimp would greatly enhance the value Monday CRM provides to its users.

Currently, the mailing function in Monday CRM is quite basic, allowing for simple email sending and automation. While this is useful for basic communication and notifications, it lacks the depth and customization that modern businesses require for effective email marketing and customer engagement.

My proposal is to enhance the mailing function of Monday CRM by integrating advanced email creation and customization features similar to those found in specialized email marketing tools like Brevo and Mailchimp.

I believe that it will greatly contribute to the Monday as a platform. We are as a company would rather pay the same amount to you and have all the functions in one platform rather torn ourselves for different tools.

I hope you will have a look at my proposal and I sincerely hope you will at least consider it. Thank you!
